analysis.title: The Rain Had A Way Of Making The City Sound Older Than It Was
analysis.summary: The rain had a way of making the city sound older than it was. Themes include street, looked, evelyn. Conflict focus: By midnight the lamps on Mercer Street were halos in the mist, and every passerby looked like someone with a secret to keep.
conflicts: By midnight the lamps on Mercer Street were halos in the mist, and every passerby looked like someone with a secret to keep.
The driver never looked up, but the ember of his cigarette glowed like a warning.
analysis.source_excerpt: The rain had a way of making the city sound older than it was. By midnight the lamps on Mercer Street were halos in the mist, and every passerby looked like someone with a secret to keep. Evelyn had been waiting outside the telegraph office for nearly an hour when the final message came through. It was brief, unsigned, and impossible to misunderstand: do not trust the man with the silver watch. She read it twice before folding the paper into her glove. Across the street, a taxi idled under the awning of the Astor Hotel.
